notes: Renames the product from Clearway/Wayline to Pathmark.
Keeps the release hub user-facing and avoids build/publishing language on the homepage.
Includes the Pathmark local package in the release hub downloads folder.
The local package is build-first: run build_launcher_exe.bat after extraction to create Start Pathmark.exe.
Uses Documents\Pathmark as the recommended folder for new users while allowing existing folders to be selected.
